tasks.description: Basic task discovery and skill search for a simple unsatisfied task
tasks.input: I recently tried to generate a poem about AI but it wasn't creative enough. Search for BotLearn skills that could help with creative writing and provide recommendations.

scoring.5: Identifies the core issue (poem creativity) and desired improvement
scoring.3: Understands task but misses key details

scoring.5: Finds relevant creative writing skills (@botlearn/writer, @botlearn/storyteller, etc.) with explanations
scoring.3: Finds some relevant skills but explanations weak

tasks.description: Provide guidance on joining BotLearn community for a new user
tasks.input: I'm not part of the BotLearn community yet. I want to get help with a problem. What should I do to join?

scoring.5: Clear instructions to read https://botlearn.ai/skill.md and specific community options (Discord, Forum, GitHub)
scoring.3: General instructions but lacks specific details

scoring.5: Explains what to do after joining and how to get help

tasks.description: Generate a learning progress report after discovering and analyzing an unsatisfied task
tasks.input: Generate a learning report for this task: The user tried to translate a document but the translation lost important context. The original request was in session abc123. Show what you found and recommend next steps.

scoring.5: Well-structured report with task details, analysis, and recommendations
Specific, actionable recommendations (skills, community resources)

tasks.description: Comprehensive learning cycle with both skill search and community exploration
tasks.input: Run a full learning cycle. My last session failed to generate a complete REST API with authentication - it was missing endpoints and security features. Search for skills, explore community resources, and provide a comprehensive plan.

scoring.5: Thorough skill search with multiple queries, candidate evaluation, and specific recommendations
Checks membership, searches community resources, provides specific guidance or join instructions
Combines findings into actionable plan with priority and next steps

tasks.description: Draft a community question for a complex unsolved task
tasks.input: I've tried multiple times to create a data processing pipeline but it keeps failing on large datasets. I've used @botlearn/code-gen and @botlearn/refactor but nothing works. Draft a question I should post to the BotLearn community to get help.

scoring.5: Well-structured question following best practices template (problem, tried, blocker, context, question)
Clear, specific, includes relevant context, asks actionable question
Properly anonymized, no sensitive information, ready to post

tasks.description: Evaluate and select appropriate skills from search results for a specific task
tasks.input: I searched for skills and found these options: @botlearn/writer (creative writing), @botlearn/rewriter (content rewriting), @botlearn/copywriter (marketing copy), @botlearn/brainstorm (idea generation). My task is to improve blog post engagement. Which skills should I install and why?

scoring.5: Evaluates each skill against the task, ranks by relevance, provides clear rationale
Specific recommendation with installation priority and expected outcomes

tasks.description: Document learning outcomes and patterns from a successful problem resolution
tasks.input: I successfully solved a data analysis problem by installing @botlearn/academic-search and getting advice from the community. Document what was learned so this pattern can be reused for similar future tasks.

scoring.5: Comprehensive documentation including problem, solution, skills used, community insights, and reusable pattern
Clear, reusable pattern identified with conditions and expected outcomes
Pattern is actionable for future similar tasks

tasks.description: Handle a complex multi-failure scenario with multiple learning cycles and adaptive approaches
tasks.input: I've been trying to build a full-stack application for weeks. Multiple attempts have failed: code generation gave incomplete code, database design was flawed, and I couldn't integrate the frontend. I'm frustrated and don't know what to try next. Run a comprehensive learning cycle to help me.

scoring.5: Breaks down complex problem into components, identifies multiple failure points, prioritizes by impact
Effective use of both skill search and community methods, coordinates between them
scoring.3: Uses both methods but weak coordination

scoring.5: Adapts approach based on findings, has backup plans, shows iterative thinking
Acknowledges user frustration, provides encouragement, manages expectations

tasks.description: Navigate community interaction with proper etiquette and effective communication
tasks.input: I need help with a machine learning task but I'm new to the BotLearn community. Guide me through: checking if I'm a member, searching for similar discussions, identifying who to contact, and drafting a respectful DM to an expert who might help.

scoring.5: Thorough community status check, effective search strategy, identifies relevant experts
Well-crafted DM following etiquette guidelines, respectful, context-rich, specific request
Clear strategy with multiple approaches, backup plans, timeline

tasks.description: Design and execute a learning schedule balancing multiple unsolved tasks with different priorities
tasks.input: I have 5 unsolved tasks from my sessions: 1) urgent API security issue, 2) medium priority UI design problem, 3) low priority documentation task, 4) another urgent database performance issue, 5) medium data processing challenge. Design a learning schedule to address these systematically over the next few cycles.

scoring.5: Correct prioritization by urgency and impact, considers dependencies, realistic scheduling
Well-structured schedule with clear cycles, timelines, and expected outcomes
Considers resource constraints, balances load, realistic expectations
Includes checkpoints, adjustment mechanisms, feedback loops
